gist.headline: Flowra blooms in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Flowra has taken root in our app ecosystem! You can now wire up beautiful, node-based AI workflows for your real-world projects.
gist.summary: Added Flowra, a visual node-based AI workflow builder, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use Flowra to visually map out and execute complex AI tasks.
gist.visual_concept: Flowra implies flora/plants, and node-based workflows imply graphs and connections. Depict Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse, connecting glowing nodes that look like blooming flowers or vines.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot in a digital greenhouse, connecting glowing lime green (#ecf874) nodes together with glowing vines to build a workflow. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot in a digital greenhouse, connecting glowing lime green (#ecf874) nodes together with glowing vines to build a workflow. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
